stages.label: Source Identified
stages.description: A potentially relevant source has been identified for one tadalafil review question.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Recoverable source metadata, source URL or DOI/PMID when available, and an initial relevance reason.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Treating source existence or study title as evidence of benefit or safety.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Screening decision and extracted study artifact or exclusion reason.

stages.label: Study Extracted
stages.description: A study, label, review, or mechanistic source has been converted into a structured artifact with population, exposure, comparator, endpoint, and limitations.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Artifact fields include population_profile, tadalafil_exposure, study_design, comparator_context, safety_findings, directness_to_target_population, and confounding_and_bias_limits.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Ignoring that ED/BPH/PAH or older clinical populations may be indirect for healthy men age 30 to 50.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Atomic findings with source locators and endpoint-specific results.

stages.label: Finding Extracted
stages.description: A source-backed atomic finding states one endpoint result, direction, directness, and safety or limitation context.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Finding has a source locator, endpoint_measure, effect_estimate or explicit qualitative result, and directness_to_target_population.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Converting a surrogate, mechanistic, or observational association into a clinical recommendation.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Support map linking findings to a bounded claim.

stages.label: Safety Boundary Appraised
stages.description: Contraindications, interactions, adverse events, dose limits, and population risk factors have been reviewed alongside possible benefits.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Safety appraisal references current labeling and any source-specific adverse-event data relevant to the claim.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Publishing a benefit statement while hiding nitrate, riociguat, alpha-blocker, antihypertensive, alcohol, renal/hepatic, vision, hearing, or priapism risk boundaries.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Claim support map includes both benefit and risk caveats.

stages.label: Claim Supported
stages.description: A public synthesis claim is backed by concrete findings, sources, and explicit directness boundaries.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Claim includes supporting_evidence, supporting_finding_ids, supporting_source_ids, population_profile, tadalafil_exposure, endpoint_domain, safety_findings, and limitations.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Claim language exceeds direct human evidence or implies off-label medical advice.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Required appraisal lanes accept the staged bundle.

stages.label: Reviewed Baseline
stages.description: Required appraisal lanes have accepted source fidelity, population directness, exposure directness, endpoint validity, safety framing, and synthesis boundaries.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Complete non-blocking evidence appraisals for required lanes.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Treating a baseline as final or as a prescribing recommendation.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Review updates monitor new evidence and label changes.
